reviews.positives: Bad

Staff very not helpful.
Service is terrible and lousy

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The location.
reviews.negatives: The smell of mold.

reviews.title: Not Recommended For Anyone
reviews.text: Lets start with the check-in procedure. Arrived asked for passports ect standard procedures and then were given our room card... that is it. We weren't told what was on offer at the hotel, what there was to do nothing, just here is your card good bye. Next is the room, from a 5 star establishment you would expect the place to be clean and sure the rooms WERE nice 5 years ago but our room had a rusted mirror and dirty carpets, this is not acceptable for a 5 star hotel. The fact that the AC is limited to their 23C really rubbed me the wrong way as I come from a climate where 23C is considered a warm day and I can only sleep when it is cold so I couldn't sleep when it was constantly warm. The only thing that is a plus for this place is the breakfast as it was your standard breakfast you get at a 4 star hotel. Again don't waste your money on this place as it is not a 5 star hotel, more in-line of 3-4 star establishment.
reviews.response:
Dear Justin,
Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at Wyndham Legend Halong Hotel. I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectations; please allow me to express my sincerest apologies.
Your feedback is very important to us. Please rest assured that we are taking the appropriate measures to address the problem and prevent any future occurrences. Here at Wyndham Hotels and Resorts, we continuously strive to meet your needs and expectations.
We appreciate the time you took to share your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the future.
Your Wyndham Legend Halong team

reviews.title: It’s decent, but I wouldn’t rate it higher than 3.5 - 4 stars
reviews.positives: The hotel’s location is excellent, close to the city’s main facilities. The staff were friendly and helpful, just like the Vietnamese people in general — always warm and welcoming to guests. The view was stunning, and the overall services were good.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is old, and so is the furniture — to the point that parts of the bathroom had yellowed from age. It’s definitely time for a renovation, dear hotel management. The breakfast lacked items that would appeal to guests coming from outside Asia. Also, placing a note on the guest’s table stating that they will be charged for any missing or damaged items from the room feels out of place in a high-quality hotel. The absence of informational brochures or guides outlining the country’s tourist attractions and safety guidelines is a noticeable shortcoming.

reviews.title: One of the worst experiences
reviews.text: I booked this place through Agoda and there was no advisory issued about not accepting guests from my home town. So on the booking day, i travelled 150km or 2 hours to the hotel and they rejected to check me in saying im from an unacceptable neighborhood due to Covid. I was double vaccinated too. It was very unfair on me after travelling so long because the fault was 100% with the hotel as well as Agoda for not giving any advisory before and then charging me the fee in full. The check in staff was rude and didnt allow any flexibility. The hotel itself was a rude place and there was no one to welcome guests at the entrance. A security was looking rude and empty. Finally i got a refund that was also in Agoda cash which can be redeemed only in selected properties. Overall a big loss and ruined the whole vacation. Dont ever go here and be careful when booking through Agoda because they dont give any travel advisory.

reviews.title: Nice, but I've found better value at other hotels and resorts in Vietnam.
reviews.positives: The room and view were nice overall and the facilities were beautiful. The lobby area is really nice. The pools were great and the breakfast was tasty. I like the big bathroom with bathtub and lots of windows and natural light.
reviews.negatives:
I'd say the style of the hotel was a bit too formal for my taste - If I'm on vacation in a place with beaches and oceans, I'd prefer the aesthetics and mood of the hotel to reflect the relaxed state of mind I'm trying to achieve, but this hotel feels more like a place for business people.

Another thing I didn't like was the loud karaoke blasting from across the street, and the way the hydraulic door closer was worn out on the balcony door, so it slammed shut on windy days.

Also, the breakfast was pretty expensive. I don't think it was 500,000 vnd breakfast.

reviews.title: Awful staff
reviews.text: Rude, unhelpful, no concept of customer service. AVOID LIKE THE PLAGUE

reviews.text:
Accidentally booked this hotel when I meant to book ***, which they would sadly not refund me for. 
This hotel is more expensive than the other one and has less facilities. The pool is dirty, the spa is closed (ironically they refer you to *** for this one) and it feels like the whole place is understaffed.

reviews.negatives:
There is one thing I would say is late cleaning up the room. I have a group family with 4 rooms staying for 2 nights. However, the room has not been cleaned up until late afternoon. 
The lady at reception (name Ms. Trang) show bad attitude saying that due to hotel full capacity they cannot clean up the room soon and the cleaner does cleaning from lower floor to upper floor. I would say it’s not a matter of customer. If hotel is full capacity, they should arrange more staff and should not blame it to customer. Was it customer’s responsibility for the hotel’s full capacity??

reviews.title: Wonderful spacious room overlooking the Bay!
reviews.positives: We stayed at the Wyndham prior to our Ha Long Bay tour which left early in the morning. Our room was fantastic with views of the bay and the bridge! It was a huge room with very large bathroom and very comfortable beds. There are a few close by coffee shops which were an easy walk.

reviews.title: Not what you expect from Wyndham
reviews.text: This hotel still needs a lot of work to live up to the Wyndham brand.  Here are just a few of the problems we experienced during our stay.  (1) The restaurant didn't have several items listed on the menu available (I expect this from local restaurants but not from Wyndham). (2) There was no staff manning the poolside bar in the middle of the day. We had to hunt around for staff to order a drink at the pool bar. (3) No spa facilities and no gift shop. (4) The electricity kept going out in our room as there was an electrical short in one of the outlets when we had our laptop plugged in (clearly a fire hazard). (5) Though we selected rooms with breakfast included we had to pay for extra for the breakfast upon check-in.  (6) Loud karaoke was thumping above the restaurant which really killed the serene dining experience. (7) Visible water damage in the hallway of the 16th floor where we stayed and missing tiles from the pool (not reassuring for a newly built hotel). (8) Arranging a taxi at the front desk to take our group to the Ha Long Bay port was a 45 minute ordeal. (9) Speaking of taxis, one taxi we order at the front desk to take our group to dinner gave us the "no-meter-special-tourist-price" that was five times the amount of the metered price. Front desk should only order reputable taxi services.
reviews.response:
Dear Michael,
Thank you for taking your time to tell us about your experience at Wyndham Legend Halong. 
I would like to apologize for the poor experience you had with us and for not being able to meet your expectation. Regarding your comment about the missing items in the menu in the restaurant, the loud karaoke, the missing manning at the pool bar in the middle of day, I have shared it with our Food & Beverage Manager to review and take an appropriate measure to improve the service. In regard to the Spa and gift shop facilities, I am pleasure to share with you that we planned to open them very soon. Furthermore, I have worked with our Chief Engineer about the electricity and water leaking in the hallway to fix it immediately. I have also shared your concerns about the taxi service with Front Office team to ensure such issue will not happen again. 
Once again, thank you for your review and I look forward to host you back soon. 
Best regards,
Nguyen Thi Thanh Tam
Front Office Man

I checked in on Wednesday, May 20. No one was opening the hotel door and get my luggage (the hotel was nearly empty). I went to the reception to check-in (was checked by Ms. Dang Thi Thu Trang, as I remembered). She gave me my keys and breakfast vouchers, that's it. No more instructions like where to go, which floor, where to get breakfast... She wrote down my Credit Card Number behind my credit card bill, which also made me felt insecure, it was supposed to be on a hotel form. 

When I complained, she just said sorry and nothing else. Still no instructions or else. 

I need to complain this so the Hotel Management is aware of this staff and retrain her. 

Thank you.

reviews.title: Nice hotel but could improve
reviews.text: The hotel itself is very nice - clean, well maintained and in a decent location (especially for a view of the bridge/cable car/ferris wheel). Downside is that there is not really anything outside hotel unless you walk 10-15 minutes. down to Sunworld area. The staff are attentive but some basic things are missing. Communication between the downstairs restaurant and reception was not very good leading to confusion over paying for a meal - simply thing but frustrating. Food (western dishes) in downstairs restaurant is decent but the Chinese/Japanese upstairs on level 5 was disappointing (especially for the prices). Breakfast is pretty good although perhaps a bit expensive. Kids play area was very basic and does not have many toys inside. Overall would say it is ok for 1 or 2 nights but any more than that would probably look elsewhere in Halong Bay area.

reviews.title: One night is enough
reviews.text:
Stayed 3 nights here in Junior club suite over NYE. 3nights was far too Long, not much to do in Halong except boat cruise and Sun amusement park (cable car and Ferris wheel). Area itself is not very developed,
 and lacks reasonable food options. 

Hotel put in a lot of effort to throw a NYE party and it was all hands on deck. Had a good buffet dinner with entertainment. 

Other than the NYE party, hotel tends to be understaffed. staff aren’t as friendly & accommodating / helpful as you’d expect from a big hotel chain. Their command of English is sometimes poor and their responses can come off bordering rude (don’t bother asking for egg whites at breakfast if you don’t want attitude in the AM). 

Club lounge - not much to enjoy at cocktail hour. 

We took Princess day cruise at hotel rec. Enjoyed it but found out afterwards direct booking online costs 1m VND less per couple vs booking through hotel concierge. 

Japanese restaurant was far too expensive for the quality & taste
reviews.response:
Dear Anne,
Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at Wyndham Legend Halong here.
It is our pleasure to hear that you enjoyed the New year party.
We really aprreciate your constructive feedback regarding our staffs' english, our Club Lounge service, our Japanese restaurant and our suggestion on tour booking. Thank you again for bring it to our attention.
We look forward to welcome you back soon.
Your Wyndham Legend Halong team.

reviews.title: Disapointment could have been avoided with better staff
reviews.text: We stayed here one night. We were woken up at 6:45am to the sound on power drilling on the floor directly above us. When we called to notify staff they said they would look into it. The drilling did not stop so we called again and asked what was happening and why they were drilling so early. Staff told us that the cleaning staff on our floor reported no noise. They also stated there was no construction happening in the hotel and it was outside noise that could noy be avoided. This was a blatant lie and when my partner and I walked upstairs to the next floor we discovered the entire floor was under construction and several power drills were in use. We then took pictures and went to reception and showed them and they still tried to say there was no noise. We then got very angry being blatantly lied to 3 times which insinuated we were idiots. The staff tben offered us a free buffet breakfast that should have been included in our stay anyways. The facility is lovely however staff are either hard to find, contact or talk too and dont seem to have the guests best interest in mind. I hope they learn from this review and pick up their customer service in the future.
reviews.response:
Dear Taryn,
Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at Wyndham Legend Halong.
It is our pleasure to have you with us and to receive your constructive feedback regarding the noise from the construction near your room and the customer service.

reviews.title: FIVE STAR HOTEL WITH THREE STAR SERVICE.
reviews.text: Stayed here for a few nights and we were very disappointed with the level of staff performance in the dining area. On arrival the check-in was excellent but the next morning for breakfast the staff were very inattentive. With a "Club" opening within two months the clientele will expect 5 Star Service or else they will not stay here. After speaking with Mr Luan at the Front Desk the service was a lot better but still a lot of room for improvement.  It all comes down to staff training which is not very good at present. I also object to the Hotel taking 4 million VND as a security deposit and then tell me that it will take 2 weeks to return to my account. Very unprofessional!!  I am not a backpacker, a rock and roll star who trashes rooms but a retired Police Officer who respects people and property. I would recommend that the General Manager goes to Ho Chi Minh City and stays at the Grand Hotel in Dong Khoi Street and experience what Five Star Service is all about.
reviews.response:

Over all 7/10 for a 5* it fell well short of the marque. Beware of electric open air taxis outside the hotel, they tell you they have a meter, which is true but they don't tell you it's fours times as expensive as other cabs and takes three times as long - we downloaded and used Grab which was really good. The Duty Manager, Benjamin is excellent, he can't do enough to help so seek him out!

El botellón de agua lo encontré vacío, eso sí, tuve que cambiarlo yo solo al ver otro de repuesto cerca. En la pieza te dejan 1 litro de agua diario por persona, lo cual claramente es insuficiente bajo cualquier recomendación nutricional, el agua no es potable y si pides más agua, te la cobran aparte. Claramente falta un dispensador de agua en algún lugar, como un pasillo, para que sea fácil hidratarse. No puede ser así en un hotel 5 estrellas.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Al planificar nuestro viaje a Vietnam decidimos hacer una noche en Ha Long City antes de coger un crucero por las bahías de Ha Long y Lan Ha y la verdad es que le estuve dando muchas vueltas a qué alojamiento coger. Al final me decidí por este hotel sobre todo por las vistas que ofrecía y creo que fue un acierto. Nos hicieron un upgrade gratuito en las dos habitaciones que habíamos cogido y nos dieron dos suites realmente grandes. El desayuno era muy completo. No probamos las piscinas porque preferimos recorrer la ciudad, pero tenían buena pinta. Está a sólo 10 min en Uber o taxi del paseo en la parte antigua que transcurre delante de muchas islitas de la bahía de Ha Long, y a sólo 3-5 de la zona donde está el parque de atracciones y el teleférico a la colina donde está la noria, donde además hay un montón de restaurantes.
reviews.negatives: Nos gustan normalmente hoteles más pequeños y menos masificados, pero la verdad es que para pasar una noche este hotel estuvo muy bien. Lo único que no nos gustó demasiado es que nos hicieron esperar en el check out para comprobar las habitaciones y teníamos algo de prisa para salir. También deberían limpiar el exterior de las ventanas de las habitaciones, porque las vistas valen mucho la pena y el que estuvieran sucias las deslucía un poco.

In conclusion, for the money paid, I would probably choose somewhere else for my next visit to Ha Long Bay.

We had a headache sleeping there that night. That's not a 5-star response. Note that our friend's room did not have a smell.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Das Zimmer war gross, sauber und sehr gemütlich – wir haben uns grundsätzlich wohlgefühlt.
reviews.negatives:
Leider waren wir in einem separaten Gebäude untergebracht, was sich auch in der Art der Behandlung widerspiegelte – wir fühlten uns teilweise wie Gäste zweiter Klasse. Beim Check-out gab es ein Missverständnis mit der Bezahlung, das einen zweiten Gang zur Rezeption nötig machte. Fehler können passieren, aber der Umgang damit war wenig entgegenkommend.
Während unseres Aufenthalts kam es zudem zu einem Stromausfall inklusive eines Alarms im gesamten Stockwerk – auf unsere Nachfrage hin wurde nur knapp mit „Don’t worry“ reagiert, ohne weitere Erklärung oder Hilfe.

Ein weiterer unangenehmer Moment war, als das Personal für frische Handtücher unangekündigt in unser Zimmer kam – genau in dem Moment, als ich mich umzog.

Zudem war die Kommunikation mit dem Personal schwierig, da die Englischkenntnisse recht begrenzt waren, und insgesamt wirkten die Mitarbeitenden eher unfreundlich und wenig bemüht.

reviews.title: Great hotel - large rooms - great staff

reviews.title: What a view!
reviews.text:
Only open half a year, the Wyndham is a beautiful new facility. The location gives a fantastic view of Halong Bay and the bridge (lights up at night) but it's at least 1km to walk to anything other than a couple of high-end seafood restaurants. 
The staff's overall level of English was not the best we experienced in Vietnam but they did their best and definitely tried hard. Unfortunately, being a new hotel, there were some issues that need to be addressed. They're building another facility behind the hotel and there was construction noise from early in the morning. We couldn't find any restaurants that were advertised on their own house tv channel and other than a gym and outdoor pool, the other floors felt abandoned. There was no information in the room about hotel facilities and we actually couldn't find the lounge floor without calling the front desk. When we arrived at the lounge, the staff didn't seem to know how to handle us as guests. They offer an afternoon tea with the suite room we had but there was no menu or any info as to what it entailed. The staff did a great job serving and were extremely friendly. 
Housekeeping was good and room service was tasty. Breakfast was average but the dining room was beautiful. 
Our room was a junior suite but on a low floor which we found a bit disappointing. There were windows that we could open to enjoy a cool sea breeze. The view was outstanding but the bathtub was installed backwards so the seating position inexplicably faces the guest away from the ocean. It was a beautiful bathroom and a lovely room with plenty of space. A king bed and two desks with a few chairs and a table. Again, a lot of space in a gorgeous room. 
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay here and even though the place feels abandoned during the day (most guests are in groups going to see Halong Bay) and a bit disorganized, it was lovely and an excellent stay.

reviews.title: Benjamin is the rock star!
reviews.text:
Property is decent with a decent location decent food and good rooms, but it was Benjamin at front desk who made our entire trip a great memory because of his charming manners and free upgrade to a full ocean view room on a high floor.

reviews.title: Nice Place to Stay
reviews.text:
Reception: Very helpful and excellent customer service from the staff at front desk, including the front desk manager.
Location: It is located very close to the bridge and the cable car. Very nice view from the hotel, if you are staying at a high floor, of the bay as well as the port area. Several seafood restaurants are within about one kilometer of the hotel. It is a nice walk on a clear day / night
Room: Spacious and clean. Lighting is adequate. Cleaning service is daily or when you require same.
Hot water: No complaints about hot water. Running hot water available in shower and sink and tub.
Air Condition: This was working well and was easy to control the temperature. No excessive noise from the unit.
TV: Not that many channels are available but several English channels are available.
Balcony: No Balcony . 
Wardrobe/Closet: Adequate space provided for hanging clothes.
Food: They do have a restaurant within the hotel as well as room service and two bars
Soundproof: The room was not that soundproof. We could near voices from the next room as well as from the room across our room.
WiFi: Very Good signal and data speed.
Refrigerator: Small but sufficient to hold your basic needs.
Microwave: None provided
Kettle/Coffee/Tea: Electric kettle is provided and bottles of free water is also provided. You can make tea in the room with the two free tea bags provided as well as coffee powder for coffee.
Bathroom: Basic toiletries and bath towel, hand towel and face towel. Shower cubicle. Spacious bathroom. Lighting is also adequate for shaving etc.
Socket Near Bed: Adequate sockets are available near the bed
Elevator: is very good. No long waiting period as several elevators are available.
Breakfast: We did not have breakfast at the hotel. But they Do have a breakfast buffet and Ala carte menu.  We had dinner from the restaurant and quantity and quality were good.

reviews.text:
A nice new hotel, clean, brightly lit and welcoming. The main reception staff speak good enough english and do their very best to assist you to the best of their capabilities (eg. tours, pick up and drop offs, etc).

*Do take note, if more than 2 people stay in a room there's a charge for an extra bed (charged per night), and even though Agoda presents you the option of 3 people to a room, you'll still have to pay for the extra bed when you arrive. So do call or email the hotel before hand to check and make arrangements to prevent any surprised charges.*

The hotel is about at 10-15min (walk) from the centre where the shops and local eateries are located, it is a pleasant and safe walk. The hotel can arrange a taxi pick up and drop off if you'd prefer. The advantage of this hotel is that it's not near any construction so it is very quiet through out the day and night with an unobstructed view of the ocean from your room.(assuming you paid a little more for the ocean view, which in my opinion is worth it, as these rooms have a nice view from their individual balcony)

As the hotel has stated, they have all the services provided from lounges, bars to restaurants, even though they're found throughout the hotel, some of them are not opened yet, I assume because the hotel is still new and will be opened at a later date. On a side note the gym and pool also has a nice view of the ocean.

reviews.positives: Địa điểm đẹp, phòng rộng thoáng đẹp, View rất đẹp. Mọi thứ đều ok, tốt. Tối muộn tự nhiên cái đèn treo nó cháy, tự rơi bóng khỏi đui đèn, rơi xuống sàn, gọi điện là có nhân viên lên thay bóng và xử lý ngay tức khắc, khá nhanh. Yêu cầu cũi - nôi cho em bé, lúc sau có luôn. Rất tốt.
reviews.negatives: Vừa nhận phòng lúc chiều, khoảng 9-10h tối tự nhiên cái đèn treo nó rơi cái bụp xuống bàn rồi lăn xuống sàn. Cả phòng mất điện tối om. Lúc nhận phòng thanh toán thẻ master không được, không hiểu hệ thống thanh toán có vấn đề gì không, vừa lên phòng đang cất valy xắp xếp đồ mà các bạn gọi loạn lên, giục mình xuống thanh toán luôn, cảm giác hơi thiếu tế nhị, cứ như sợ mình bùng ấy :))).

reviews.title: I met a friendly staff and truly appreciated the value of the hotel.
reviews.text: I arrived in Hai Phong on a morning flight, and judging that I couldn't walk around in the hot weather with my suitcase, I went straight to the hotel to inquire about an early check-in. They graciously accommodated me without any additional costs, and when they realized I had mistakenly booked a twin bed, Miss Trang fulfilled all my requests for a high-floor room with an ocean view balcony. I'm so grateful! Thanks to her, it became a hotel with one of the top three views of my life. I really appreciate the hotel staff for making a great first impression of Ha Long Bay. We were also very satisfied with the breakfast, as we have no aversion to spices or ingredients. I wonder why people don't choose to stay in Ha Long Bay. I went without any expectations and had a wonderful time. The pool was also the best!!

reviews.text: The hotel is very beautiful, the bed is comfortable, and the service is excellent. The food is delicious, and the May 1st celebration set is satisfying, exceeding expectations.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những cảm nhận tuyệt vời về kỳ nghỉ tại khách sạn.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách hài lòng với vẻ đẹp của khách sạn, sự êm ái của giường ngủ cũng như chất lượng dịch vụ. Đặc biệt, việc set mừng ngày 01/05 và ẩm thực đã mang lại trải nghiệm vượt ngoài mong đợi của Quý khách chính là niềm vinh dự lớn đối với chúng tôi.

Những lời khen của Quý khách là nguồn động lực to lớn để toàn thể đội ngũ không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng phục vụ.

Chúng tôi rất mong sẽ sớm được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại trong thời gian tới.

Trân trọng,
Nguyen Thuy Linh
Front Office Manager
